# K Means

**Summary**: An unsupervised learning algorithm that partitions data into K clusters based on the distance from a central point.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017]] applied K-means to identify distinct lithological populations within the Khuff formation.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- K-means produced three clusters similar to those found by FCM, identifying specific mineral concentrations. ([[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017, p. 101]])
